title: prompt send — Self-Prompting & Agent Notification
desc: How to deliver prompts to a running Claude Code / Codex window. Use prompt send for self-prompting, scheduled nudges, and agent notifications. FindAllPrompts detects the input box via UIA; the input is hidden while the agent is busy — always use --when-idle when the agent may be mid-execution.
steps: [CORE] prompt send "<name>" "<message>" — injects message into a running Claude Code or Codex window and submits. <name> matches CWD folder tag (e.g. WG-WKAppBot) or display name substring.
[DISCOVERY] prompt list — show all detectable AI windows (hwnd, host type, display name). Only windows where the input element is currently visible and enabled are returned.
[WHY-IDLE] FindAllPrompts() uses UIA to find [Edit] 'Message input'. When the agent is busy (executing a tool), this element is disabled/hidden → FindAllPrompts returns 0 → delivery fails silently.
[WHEN-IDLE] prompt send "<name>" "<msg>" --when-idle 5s — polls every 1s until the input has been idle >= 5s, then delivers. Use this whenever the agent might be mid-execution.
[AFTER] prompt send "<name>" "<msg>" --after 10s — waits a fixed delay then delivers. Use for startup sequences or when idle state is predictable.
[TIMEOUT] --timeout 5m (default 30m) — how long --when-idle keeps polling before giving up. Set short for non-critical nudges, long for important deliveries.

[FOCUSLESS] VS Code Claude Code delivery path: UIA TextPattern2.InsertTextAtSelection (truly focusless) + WM_KEYDOWN Enter to renderer. No focus steal, no clipboard clobber. Works even if another window is foreground.
[FOCUS-STEAL] If TextPattern2 fails, fallback: SmartSetForegroundWindow + clipboard paste + Enter. ClipboardGuard prevents clobbering an ongoing paste. AllowFocusSteal=true required for this path.
[FROM-EYE] Eye background tasks (skill audit, homework) use EyeMcpClient.CallFireAndForget + --when-idle so delivery waits for agent idle without blocking Eye's main loop.
[SELF-PROMPT] To notify the current agent from a script or tool: wkappbot prompt send "WG-WKAppBot" "[REMINDER] ..." --when-idle 5s --timeout 2m

[TROUBLESHOOT] exit 1 + 'No prompt windows found': agent is busy → add --when-idle 5s. 'No window matched': check wkappbot prompt list for exact display names. TextPattern2 fail: VS Code update may have changed UIA tree — check [Edit] 'Message input' still exists with a11y inspect.
author: claude
